title: Method of Steepest Ascent/Descent Algorithm
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of the steepest ascent/descent method for unconstrained optimization, showing how it uses the gradient to find a local optimum.
elements: Perform Line Search: Find step size αₖ
relationships: Compute Gradient leads to Determine Direction
Determine Direction leads to Perform Line Search
Perform Line Search leads to Update Solution
Update Solution leads to Check Convergence
Check Convergence leads to End if converged, or loops back to Compute Gradient if not
